hii team,
this is yaswanth,
updates are 
- Added Session Status Monitoring: Updated the Python backend (app/routes/webhook.py) to actively listen for WAHA's session.status webhooks, specifically watching for when it drops to SCAN_QR_CODE or LOGGED_OUT.
- Fixed QR Code Endpoint: Corrected the backend API request URL in app/services/waha.py to correctly hit /api/{session}/auth/qr to match WAHA's newest API format.
- Implemented Logout Timestamping: Created a background function that automatically records the exact time the bot disconnects, which will allow us to synchronize any missed messages when you log back in.
* Resolved QR Generation Timing: Programmed the backend to ignore WAHA's temporary STOPPED shutdown phase, forcing it to wait patiently until the new QR Code has fully finished generating before trying to download it.
* Configured Auto-Email Alerts: Replaced the n8n WhatsApp message node with an Email Send node to completely bypass the "Disconnected Phone Paradox", ensuring alerts deliver reliably even when the bot's phone is entirely offline.
* Embedded QR Code in Emails: Optimized the n8n configuration to directly embed the Base64 QR Code image right into the HTML body of the email, eliminating the need for attachments or extra processing nodes.
* Created SMTP Credentials: Successfully generated and linked a secure Google App Password to your n8n environment, authorizing it to automatically send alerts from your Gmail account!

Dear Students,

 

You are invited to attend the Orientation Session for an exciting Work-from-Home opportunity with Nabet India.

📅 Date: 1st July 26
🕙 Time: 10:00 AM (Sharp)
💻 Mode: Online

During this session, we will provide a step-by-step walkthrough of the complete application process, explain the selection stages, and address any queries you may have. It is important that all interested candidates join the session on time.

Job Opportunity: Data Annotator & Content Moderator (AI/ML Projects)

Organization: Nabet India
Work Mode: Remote (Work from Home)
Contract Duration: 6 Months
Working Hours: 6–8 Hours per Day
Compensation: ₹120 per hour

 

 

About the Role

Nabet India is expanding its AI and Machine Learning talent network and is looking for detail-oriented, analytical, and tech-savvy individuals to join as Data Annotators and Content Moderators (Review & Labeling).

This role offers an opportunity to contribute to the development of advanced AI systems by reviewing, labeling, and validating data used to train machine learning models.

Key Responsibilities

Review, categorize, and accurately label online content.
Moderate and evaluate content, including potentially sensitive material.
Maintain high standards of quality, consistency, and attention to detail.
Contribute to AI training datasets and machine learning projects.
Provide feedback to improve project quality and efficiency.
Follow project guidelines and achieve productivity targets.
Eligibility Criteria

Bachelor's degree (Graduate) or higher qualification.
Strong English communication and comprehension skills.
Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Comfortable working with diverse types of online content.
Access to a private workspace and a reliable internet connection.
Basic computer proficiency and the ability to work independently.
Selection Process

Candidates must successfully complete the following:

1. Assessment Test

Evaluates linguistic, analytical, and attention-to-detail skills.
2. Versant English Proficiency Test

Assesses spoken and written English proficiency.
Minimum qualifying level: B2+
C1 or above is preferred.
Onboarding

Candidates who successfully clear both assessments will proceed with:

Background Verification
Contract Issuance
Project Onboarding
Why Join?

Work from the comfort of your home.
Gain hands-on experience in cutting-edge AI/ML projects.
Earn Rs120 per hour.
Develop valuable analytical and content review skills.
Contribute to global AI training initiatives.
We encourage all interested candidates to attend the orientation session and complete the assessment process to be considered for onboarding.

We look forward to seeing you at 10:00 AM sharp!
